name: @field-ui/kit
description: The whole field-ui suite in one install — the engine (@field-ui/core), the DOM platform, and the web-component, React, and vanilla adapters. A meta-package: install it, then import from the specific @field-ui/* package you need.
author: Zach Shallbetter <hi@zachshallbetter.com> (https://zachshallbetter.com)
